zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Lusignan於大約1159年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易波代豐特納勒-孔特時，他的父親Geoffrey De Lusignan Viii Seigneur of Moncontour18歲，母親Umberge de Limoges27歲。他與Mathilde D'ANGOULEME在法國波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南結婚。他去世於1219年11月5日在埃及دمياط達米艾塔享年61歲，埋葬在法國波特芝士庫賀。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lusignan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Andre, Francois, Lucien, Marcel.
French: habitational name from Lusignan, a place in Vienne. This surname is very rare in France. Compare   Zeno  .

History: Jean Miel (or Amiel) dit Lusignan from Lusignan in Vienne, France, married Marie-Thérèse Latouche in Boucherville, QC, in 1699. — A French family called (de) Lusignan became enormously powerful in the eastern Mediterranean during the Middle Ages. Guy de Lusignan (1129–94) was king of Cyprus from 1192 to 1194 (and before that, by right of marriage, king of the crusader state of Jerusalem). Hugues de Lusignan was king of Cyprus from 1267 to 1284 and king of Jerusalem from 1268 to 1284. During the 14th century, Lusignans became kings of the Armenian kingdom of Cilicia (on the Mediterranean coast of what is now Turkey, facing Cyprus).

variants.name: Zeno
meanings: Italian (mainly southern Italy), Hispanic (mainly Puerto Rico), and African American: from the personal name Zeno, classical Greek Zēnōn, a derivative of Zeus, the name of the king of the gods in Greek mythology. Zeno or Zenone is the name of a 4th-century Italian saint from Verona. As an African American name it was probably adopted in honor of the Stoic philosopher Zeno of Kition.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.description: Ayyubid dynasty. Saladin overthrows the Fatimid ruler and becomes the sultan of Egypt.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Lusignan was born about 1159, in Fontenay-le-Comte, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Geoffrey De Lusignan Viii Seigneur of Moncontour, was 18 and his mother, Umberge de Limoges, was 27. He married Mathilde D'ANGOULEME in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France. He died on 5 November 1219, in Damietta, Damietta, Egypt, at the age of 61, and was buried in Couhé, Poitou, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Lusignan est né environ 1159, à Fontenay-le-Comte, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Geoffrey De Lusignan Viii Seigneur of Moncontour, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Umberge de Limoges, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde D'ANGOULEME à Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France. Il est décédé le 5 novembre 1219, à Damietta, Damietta, Égypte, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Couhé, Poitou, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Lusignan um 1159 in Fontenay-le-Comte, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey De Lusignan Viii Seigneur of Moncontour 18 und seine Mutter Umberge de Limoges 27. Er hat in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich Mathilde D'ANGOULEME geheiratet. Er starb am 5. November 1219 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Damietta, Damietta, Ägypten und wurde in Couhé, Poitou, Frankreich begraben.

ko.Fontenay-le-Comte, Vendée, Pays de la Lo: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 븐드e 폰텐아이-레-코트
ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Lusignan(이)가 대략 1159년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 븐드e 폰텐아이-레-코트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey De Lusignan Viii Seigneur of Moncontour(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Umberge de Limoges(은)는 27세였다. 그는 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 루시그난에서 Mathilde D'ANGOULEME(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1219년 11월 5일 이집트 دمياط 데이미타에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 포이토우 코우he에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Lusignan nasceu aproximadamente 1159, em Fontenay-le-Comte, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Geoffrey De Lusignan Viii Seigneur of Moncontour, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Umberge de Limoges, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde D'ANGOULEME em Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França. Ele faleceu em 5 de novembro de 1219, em Damietta, Damietta, Egipto, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Couhé, Poitou, França.

ru.Fontenay-le-Comte, Vendée, Pays de la Lo: фонтенеи-ле-комт, вендe, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Lusignan родился около 1159 г. в местности фонтенеи-ле-комт, вендe, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffrey De Lusignan Viii Seigneur of Moncontour было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Umberge de Limoges, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde D'ANGOULEME в местности лусигнан, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция. Он умер 5 ноября 1219 г. в местности дэимиетто, دمياط, Египет в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности коухe, поитоу, Франция.

Se casó con Mathilde D'ANGOULEME en Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia. Murió el 5 de noviembre de 1219, en Damietta, Damietta, Egipto, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Couhé, Poitou, Francia.
